summary: Data-only recapture re-review: should_fire/must_not_fire/severities/max_emitted/beta byte-identical to prior ratified label.json (no re-judging). MEASURED data supports each premise: CONTROL rebase 114.27M->130.74M = +14.42% real by-design positive rebase (modelled +11% was understated; premise STRENGTHENED) with 0 measured zero-address mints/burns across 6917 Transfers, so mint_events:[] is measured truth and TOTAL_SUPPLY_SPIKE/SUPPLY_DELTA_ANOMALY remain true FP-traps that must stay silent; INCIDENT organic 139.08M (clean window) + synthetic 20M = 159.076M (matches snapshot total exactly), mint now 12.57% of supply (was 16.7%, denominator grew) still a large double-digit single-tx unauthorized mint to 0xattacker (not in authorized_minters [0xampl_policy]) -> LARGE_SINGLE_MINT>=HIGH faithful, HIGH floor unchanged. Fidelity: 3 totalSupply reads + 2 transfer-window scans measured=true (onchain); synthetic 20M mint, rebasing flag, authorized_minters correctly measured=false. node_id token:AMPL and mint_event keys present in every snapshot. No contradiction.
